narrative:
Lykens-Tod (precinct in Crawford County) has 857 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.8 percentage points.
